title: aglaia kostermansii
intro: Aglaia kostermansii, also known as Kostermans' aglaia, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aglaia kostermansii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Aglaia kostermansii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the skin.
